title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!
